docs.text: Welcome to MkDocs For full documentation visit mkdocs.org . Commands mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit. Project layout mkdocs.yml # The configuration file. docs/ index.md # The documentation homepage. ... # Other markdown pages, images and other files.
docs.title: Home

docs.text: mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout

docs.text:
问题：P1和P2等价吗？ bob_take_seat_1 = And(b1,Not(b2),Not(b3),Not(a1),Not(c1)) 表示bob坐1号位并且bob不做2号位和3号位，并且alice不坐1号位，calro不坐1号位。从中可以提炼出命题如P1和P2: \(P1:b1 	o ~b2 \land ~b3 \land ~a1 \land ~c1\) \(P2:b1 \land 
eg(b2)\land
eg(b3)\land
eg(a1) \land 
eg(c1))\) Z3 found a counterexample [b3 = False, a1 = False, b1 = False, c1 = False, b2 = True] 带入发现确实 P2:F T F F F P1:F -> F&T&T&T 解释： implies 意思是忽略错误前提而考虑正确前提 命题bob坐在1号位，是必须真的坐在1号位的，所以不能忽略bob不坐在1号位的情况 把命题P1改成 b1 & (b1 -> ~b2 & ~b3 & ~a1 & ~c1)即可proved 总结 P ^ P->Q P ^ Q是等价的
docs.title: Doc1

docs.text:
bob_take_seat_1 = And(b1,Not(b2),Not(b3),Not(a1),Not(c1)) 表示bob坐1号位并且bob不做2号位和3号位，并且alice不坐1号位，calro不坐1号位。从中可以提炼出命题如P1和P2: \(P1:b1 	o ~b2 \land ~b3 \land ~a1 \land ~c1\) \(P2:b1 \land 
eg(b2)\land
eg(b3)\land
eg(a1) \land 
eg(c1))\) Z3 found a counterexample [b3 = False, a1 = False, b1 = False, c1 = False, b2 = True] 带入发现确实 P2:F T F F F P1:F -> F&T&T&T
docs.title: 问题：P1和P2等价吗？

docs.text: implies 意思是忽略错误前提而考虑正确前提 命题bob坐在1号位，是必须真的坐在1号位的，所以不能忽略bob不坐在1号位的情况 把命题P1改成 b1 & (b1 -> ~b2 & ~b3 & ~a1 & ~c1)即可proved
docs.title: 解释：

docs.text: P ^ P->Q P ^ Q是等价的
docs.title: 总结
